docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $1,070.50 FILED BY CAMPBELL, TERRY AS TO DEFENDANT ROMINGER, HEATH ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR MAR-03-2026 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
DECLARATION OF DUE DILIGENCE IN ATTEMPTING SERVICE SERVICE FEE: $439.06 FILED BY PLAINTIFF CAMPBELL, TERRY AS TO DEFENDANT ROMINGER, HEATH
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED JAN-17-2026, PERSONAL SERVICE, SERVICE FEE: $439.06 AS TO DEFENDANT ROMINGER, HEATH

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF MAR-03-2026 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF MAR-03-2026 BY VISITING JUDGE ZEPEDA. PLAINTIFF TERRY CAMPBELL IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT HEATH ROMINGER IS PRESENT WITH WITNESS JOSE AUSTINE HUCHIN NATUREL. PROOF OF SERVICE ON FILE. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: CARRIE ZEPEDA; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN. NOT REPORTED.(D506)
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF MAR-03-2026 - JUDGMENT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF CAMPBELL, TERRY RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT ROMINGER, HEATH $1,070.50 PRINCIPAL, $155.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,225.50, DEFENDANT MAY PAY THE $1225.50 IN 4 PAYMENTS (3 AT $300 AND 1 AT $325) BY THE 3RD DAY OF EACH MONTH BEGINNING ON APR-3-2026. A REVIEW HEARING IS SET FOR JUL-15-2026 AT 1:30 PM IN D506. IF DEFENDANT MAKES ALL OF THE PAYMENTS THE PARTIES DO NOT HAVE TO APPEAR. IF DEFENDANT FAILS TO MAKE TIMELY PAYMENTS AND HAS NOT PAID THE JUDGMENT, THIS JUDGMENT WILL BE AMENDED TO INCLUDE 10% INTEREST AS OF APR-4-2026 AND ALL REMAINING AMOUNTS OF THE UNPAID JUDGMENT WILL BE DUE IMMEDIATELY. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR FOR PROGRESS REPORT ON JUDGMENT PAYMENTS. ***SEE JUDGMENT FORM AND NOTICE FILED MAR-04-2026*** HEARING SET FOR JUL-15-2026 AT 09:00 AM IN DEPT 506
